text: an elephant is standing under a spray of water, while another elephant stands farther away
A city with people walking and buildings in the background.
A dirt road that has two people on an elephant and a dog further up the road looking back at them.
A small giraffe looking over a wall of an enclosure
A teddy bear and a doll placed on the bed
There is some hand towels and sinks in a bathroom.

The room in the house is very empty and clean.
